race.comment: VEGAS MISSILE (9) was thereabouts last time out when second at Pakenham Synthetic over 1200m, beaten a long neck having also just found one better on debut there. Drawn ideally and can improve again, takes catching.  FINE SIERRA (12) resumes from a spell of five months. She showed good ability last time in, placing on debut at Pakenham in a good maiden (Tag The Bridge goes around in R1 and was 2nd there). Tough draw but should run well. BOHEMIAN STAR (2) stepped out on his debut over 1200m at this track two weeks ago and finished fifth, beaten 1.4 lengths. Should come on from that and take holding out. COMMANDEUR (5) presents third up and ready to peak, he maps for a lovely run and should take beating.
